arabic text: يَا ذَا الّذِي كَانَ قَبْلَ كُلّ شَيْءٍ،

english translation text: In the name of Allah the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: يَا ذَا الّذِي كَانَ قَبْلَ كُلّ شَيْءٍ،
english translation text: O He who, existed before everything else,
Then He will remain while everything else perishes.

arabic text: يَا ذَا الّذِي لَيْسَ كَمِثْلِهِ شَيْءٌ،
english translation text: O He who has none similar to Him.

arabic text: وَيَا ذَا الّذِي لَيْسَ فِي السّمَاوَاتِ العُلَى،
english translation text: O He who, there is none in the elevated heavens,

arabic text: وَلا فِي الأَرَضِينَ السّفْلَى، وَلا فَوْقَهُنّ وَلا تَحْتَهُنّ
english translation text: nor in the deep earth, nor above them nor below them,
nor between them, a God who is worshipped besides Him.

arabic text: لَكَ الحَمْدُ حَمْداً لا يَقْوَى عَلَى إحْصَائِهِ إلاَّ أَنْتَ،
english translation text: For You is praise, a praise which cannot be comprehended, except by You.
Bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad,

arabic text: صَلاةً لا يَقْوَى عَلَى إحْصَائِهَا إلاَّ أَنْتَ.
english translation text: blessings which none can comprehend except You.
